name: python3-dsnap
title: python3-dsnap
description:
utility for downloading EBS snapshots (Python 3)
This package contains a utility for downloading EBS snapshots using the EBS
Direct API's.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dsnap because utility for downloading EBS snapshots (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dsnap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dsnap [options] [args]` as documented upstream for dsnap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dsnap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dsnap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
